title: Why is Nepal’s private press covered in question marks today?
contentSnippet: Dozens of newspapers are blanking out their front pages to fight a new government rule that pulls state ads from private media.

title: Be cautious of China ‘incentive’: expert
Russian authorities detain suspect over St. Petersburg cafe blast
Peru general elections: Fujimori leading, runoff likely
contentSnippet: Keiko Fujimori looked set to face a conservative rival in a runoff vote. More than 30 candidates had been contention for the presidency.
